build-*/

debug/
release/

# Qt Creator files
*.pro.user
*.pro.user.*
*.autosave
*.qmlproject.user

# CMake
CMakeLists.txt.user
CMakeCache.txt
CMakeFiles/
cmake-build-*/

# Qt Creator
*.qbs.user
*.qbs.user.*

# Object files
*.o
*.obj

# MOC, UIC, RCC generated files
moc_*
qrc_*
ui_*

# Executables
*.exe
*.out

# Logs
*.log

# OS files
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db
